title: Accord final
writer: Max Kolpé, Jacques Natanson, Ignacy Rosenkranz
actors: Käthe von Nagy, Jules Berry, George Rigaud
plot: A young American violinist is betting with his European organisor that he will marry the tenth girl he meets the next day within 2 months. If he fails, he looses his Stradivari, if he wins he will get $30,000, but he falls for her...
